title: Перенести основное взаиможействие с runpod через runpodctl
draft: "Congratulations on taking on your first open source issue! Your title 'Перенести основное взаимодействие с runpod через runpodctl' (Translate: 'Transferring main interaction with runpod through runpodctl') suggests a valuable contribution. Don't worry if it takes some time or if you encounter challenges. Every step is a learning opportunity. Good luck and happy coding!"
